description:
As a YL customer,
    I want to add some items to the shopping cart,
    So I can place a one-time order.
name: Place an order

elements.name: Place an order using only CC, SP or PayPal

steps.name: I am at the Login page
I log in to the Storefront with user "5010"  and password "Password1"
I add the item to the shopping cart
I fill the checkout form with "Lehi, UT Will Call Pick-up" and "PayPal Account"
I submit the order with donation "Yes"
I should see the order confirmation "THANK YOU FOR SHOPPING YOUNG LIVING."

elements.name: Place an order using only CC, SP or PayPal

steps.name: I am at the Login page
I log in to the Storefront with user "5010"  and password "Password1"
I add the item to the shopping cart
I fill the checkout form with "Expedite" and "Card ending with"
I submit the order with donation "No"
